name: Duotone
description: The scene behind the window blurred and remapped onto a two-colour gradient by brightness, the concert-poster look. Shadows take the first colour and highlights the second. It shows through wherever the window itself is translucent.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Blur radius
parameters.description: How strongly the scene behind the window is blurred (px)

parameters.name: Corner radius
parameters.description: Corner rounding of the pane (px, match the Border pack)

parameters.name: Contrast
parameters.description: How sharply brightness splits between the two colours, where 1.0 is a linear blend

parameters.name: Shadow colour
parameters.description: Colour the darkest parts of the scene map to

parameters.name: Highlight colour
parameters.description: Colour the brightest parts of the scene map to
